name: LeakyReLU² + EMA + QAT + PartialRoPE + LNScale + BigramHash(20480) + MLP3.5x
blurb: Our own codebase upgraded with top techniques: LeakyReLU(0.5)² activation, EMA(0.997) weight averaging, late QAT at 15% warmdown, Partial RoPE (16/64 dims), LN Scale (1/sqrt(layer+1)), BigramHash(20480), MLP 3.5x. 11L x 512d, int5/int6 mixed quantization + zstd-22.
author: deepchand
